name: @truefoundry/tfy-hermes-agent
description: Standalone TrueFoundry Hermes agent deployment compiler and runtime

scripts.check: node --check controller/controller.mjs && node --check executor/executor.mjs && node --check bin/tfy-hermes-agent.mjs && node --check controller/openai-adapter.test.mjs && node --check bin/compiler.test.mjs && python3 -m py_compile snapshotter/snapshotter.py && npm test
